channel.title: Iro AI Blog
channel.description: Short, practical writing on AI fluency, prompting, AI tools, and the active-practice method that beats endless video courses.

item.title: How to actually learn ChatGPT in 2026
item.dc:creator: Iro AI
item.description: Most people learn ChatGPT by random experimentation and hit a ceiling. Here's the active-practice method that builds judgment instead of just memorising prompts.

item.title: The 7 prompt patterns that work everywhere
item.dc:creator: Iro AI
item.description: Forget magic phrases. These 7 prompt patterns transfer across models and survive model upgrades — the foundation of practical prompt engineering.

item.title: How to spot AI hallucinations in 5 seconds
item.dc:creator: Iro AI
item.description: AI models confidently invent facts, citations, and numbers. Here are the five-second checks that catch most hallucinations — and a longer set for when stakes are high.

item.title: AI agents, explained without the jargon
item.dc:creator: Iro AI
item.description: Strip away the hype: an AI agent is a system that pursues a goal through multiple steps, often using tools. Here's what they really do, when they're worth using, and where they predictably break.

item.title: The best free AI tools for daily work in 2026
item.dc:creator: Iro AI
item.description: A 2026-up-to-date guide to free-tier AI tools that are actually worth using for daily work — what each is good for, where they fall short, and how to combine them.
